description_for_human: Summarize any podcast, YouTube video, talk, or conference recording. Provide a URL and get a structured markdown summary published as a GitHub Gist.
description_for_model: Use this skill when the user provides a URL to audio or video content and wants a structured summary. Supported sources include YouTube, Apple Podcasts, Spotify, and conference recording sites. The skill resolves the URL to a YouTube equivalent if needed, downloads the auto-generated transcript via yt-dlp, generates a comprehensive markdown summary (key takeaways, guest background, core thesis, major topics, resources), saves it to ~/Downloads/, and publishes it as a public GitHub Gist. Always prefer YouTube or PocketCasts as the canonical source link over Apple Podcasts.
